main.description: A biodiversity observation record following Darwin Core standards. Represents a single occurrence of an organism.

eventDate.description: The date-time when the observation occurred, in ISO 8601 format (Darwin Core dwc:eventDate).

decimalLatitude.description: The geographic latitude in decimal degrees (Darwin Core dwc:decimalLatitude). Valid range: -90 to 90.

decimalLongitude.description: The geographic longitude in decimal degrees (Darwin Core dwc:decimalLongitude). Valid range: -180 to 180.

coordinateUncertaintyInMeters.description: The horizontal distance (in meters) from the given coordinates describing the smallest circle containing the whole of the Location (Darwin Core dwc:coordinateUncertaintyInMeters).

associatedMedia.description: Strong references to media records documenting the observation (Darwin Core dwc:associatedMedia).

surveyTargetID.description: The SurveyTarget this Occurrence was intended to satisfy. Expresses observer intent.

eventID.description: Event (e.g. a Survey) this Occurrence was a part of (sensu DarwinCore dwc:eventID).

organismQuantity.description: The quantity of the organism present at the time of the Occurrence. Generally an integer or float but may be categorical, e.g. 'many' or '10-100' (sensu DarwinCore dwc:organismQuantity).

organismQuantityType.description: The type of quantification system used for the quantity of organisms (sensu DarwinCore dwc:organismQuantityType).
